chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.S-645 of 2022 Along with C.P. Nos. S-646 & 668 to 670 of 2022 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ 1.For order on office objection 2.For hg of CMA No.4248/22 3.For hg of main case 19.08.2024. M/s. S.A. Khokhar and Shabana Khokhar, advocates for the petitioners in all the petitions. Mr. Naeem Akhtar, advocate for respondent No. 2. Mr. Meeran Muhammad Shah, Addl. Advocate General. After hearing the cases at some length, these cases are disposed of along with pending application(s) with consent, whereby the impugned judgments by the Rent Controller and Appellate Court striking off defence of the petitioners and directed them to hand over the demised premises are set aside. The cases are remanded to the learned Rent Controller to record evidence of parties and decided the cases on merits within three months. JUDGE HANIF
